messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

{
  "node_id": "0167",
  "title": "AI",
  "page_index": 1,
  "page_range": "1"
}

Section text:

Kling Al

Saylo

message.content: This section can answer questions about which specific AI-related entities are listed, namely PolyBuzz, Kling Al, and Saylo. It does not contain information regarding dates, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, tables, figures, or evidence types.
